items.scenario: You recently signed up for a four-week beginner pottery workshop at the Linwood Arts Studio that meets on Tuesday evenings. After the first session, you realized the studio expects students to bring their own clay tools and an apron, which were not mentioned in the registration confirmation.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Caldera. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the missing information from the registration confirmation
Ask which specific tools and supplies are required for the workshop
Suggest including a supply list in future confirmation emails
items.subject: Supply list for the Tuesday pottery workshop

items.scenario: You are a junior taking an upper-level anthropology seminar that requires a fieldwork interview component. Your advisor recommended a local museum curator as a potential interviewee, but you have been unable to reach her after three weeks of attempted contact through the museum's general inquiry line.
items.direction: Write an email to Dr. Brennan. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain the difficulty you've had contacting the curator
Request a direct introduction or alternative contact method
Mention how the delay is affecting your fieldwork timeline
items.subject: Help reaching the museum curator for fieldwork

items.scenario: Your friend Ramon invited you to join a three-day backpacking trip in the Cascade Mountains next month. You'd like to go but a research deadline means you can only join for the first two days and would need to return by Saturday evening.
items.direction: Write an email to Ramon. In your email, do the following:
goals: Tell Ramon you'd like to join part of the trip
Explain the Saturday evening return constraint
Suggest splitting the drive or coordinating a shared ride back
items.subject: Joining the Cascades trip through Saturday

items.scenario: You ordered a refurbished mechanical keyboard from an online electronics retailer two weeks ago. The keyboard arrived with three keys that stick and a missing detachable cable, even though the listing clearly stated both were included with the unit.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Albright. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the defects and the missing cable
Request a replacement unit or a partial refund
Ask about the return shipping process for the defective keyboard
items.subject: Defective keyboard on order MK-48217
